docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,830.00 FILED BY HUNG, MEI AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, DAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-18-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUNG, MEI AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, DAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-18-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-18-2026 BY STEPHEN M. MURPHY. PLAINTIFF MEI HUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAN LIU IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER AIDONG NI. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: STEPHEN MURPHY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-18-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUNG, MEI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LIU, DAN PRIOR CASE CSM-25-870845 BASED ON SAME FACTS WAS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE ON 1-22-26. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-27-2026, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, DAN
